settings.text: This candle stopped me mid-cry. The scent opened something I'd been holding closed for a year. I've ordered three more.
settings.name: M. Hayes

settings.text: Til Death smells exactly like the memory I've been trying to hold onto. I light it every Sunday.
settings.name: T. Rousseau

settings.text: The craftsmanship is unlike anything I've seen. This isn't a candle — it's a ritual.
settings.name: D. Whitfield
